title: 100 Sheets Coloured Paper - A4 Origami Paper 20 Vivid Colors, 60gsm Double Sided Construction Papers for Arts Craft, DIY, Cutting and Drawing
features: 【A4 Origami Paper Kit】This set includes 100 sheets of A4 colored paper in 20 different colors, with 5 sheets per color, making it perfect for daily crafting needs
【Vibrant Colors】Each construction paper sheet boasts even coloration, and the 20 vibrant shades offer diverse creative possibilities, adding a magical touch to DIY projects
【Material】The craft paper is made from pure wood pulp, featuring a smooth surface and a thick, pliable texture. With a weight of 60 gsm, it can be folded repeatedly without tearing
【Dimensions】The multicoloured paper measures 210 × 297 mm (8.26 × 11.7 inches), with neatly trimmed edges and precise dimensions for accurate crafting

【Applications】A4 paper suitable for paper cutting, DIY gifts, writing, drawing, card making, letter writing, and more. A perfect choice for birthday parties, holiday decorations, and handmade projects
description: Caianwin A4 Origami Kit Coloured Craft Paper 20 Colors Paper Crafts for Adults, Kids, Precise Fold. Unleash Your Creativity! A4 Crafting Paper folds and cuts with ease, making it perfect for family gatherings and friends' parties. Enjoy the simple pleasure of crafting together with family, friends or children. The edges of A4 origami paper double sided are neatly trimmed, free from fraying and odourless, ensuring safe use. This A4 construction paper is ideal for painting, offering endless enjoyment throughout the creative process. Packaging includes: 100 Sheets × Origami Paper A4(20 Colors)
